title: Human Tissue Slicing and Dissections for Nuclear Isolations
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"avh4h","text":"This protocol describes the slicing and microdissection procedure on frozen post-mortem human brain tissue to be used to isolate nuclei for subsequent transcriptional profiling.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cuisp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jo3j","text":"Note: Research reported in this publication was supported by the National Institute Of Mental Health of the National Institutes of Health under Award Number U01MH114812.
